name: Red Pepper Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup red bell pepper, chopped fine
1/2 teaspoon Sambal Oelek or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until evenly distributed.
3. Serve with chicken, beef, or blue corn tortilla chips.
Makes about 2 cups. Store for short periods in the refrigerator.
